metadata.description: Single-skill marketplace: generate and maintain a per-project user manual (and HTML viewer) from the project's superpowers artifacts. Idempotent across runs.

plugins.name: user-manual
plugins.description: Reads docs/superpowers/{specs,plans,findings,reviews}/*.md, synthesizes a novice-friendly user manual at docs/manual/user-manual.md (Quick Start, Glossary, Daily Usage, Configuration, Troubleshooting, Architecture), tracks every cited artifact's content hash for idempotent reruns, and bootstraps a self-contained HTML viewer with a sticky TOC sidebar.
